title: Gmail node generates localhost approval links
symptom: The Gmail 'Send Message and Wait for Response' node generates approval links pointing to 'http://localhost:5678', leading to 'connection refused' errors when clicked by recipients.
applies_when: Using Gmail 'Send and Wait for Response' node
not_this_if: Using a different node that does not generate localhost links
Running n8n in a non-Docker environment
root_cause: The issue arises when the n8n instance is configured in queue mode, which can lead to incorrect URL generation for approval links. This misconfiguration causes the links to default to localhost instead of the intended domain.
fix_steps: Downgrade the n8n instance to a previous version that does not use queue mode
Test the Gmail node again to ensure approval links are generated correctly
agent_instruction: Downgrade the n8n instance to resolve the localhost link issue.
